title: Set 6: Preparing for a Party 🎈

conversation.speaker: Sarah
conversation.text: Are you coming to my birthday party on Saturday?

conversation.speaker: Sarah
conversation.text: Have you already bought a present for me?

conversation.speaker: Sarah
conversation.text: What time do you think you’ll arrive?

conversation.speaker: Sarah
conversation.text: Shall I ask my dad to pick you up from your house?

conversation.speaker: Sarah
conversation.text: Where shall we put all the food and drinks?

conversation.speaker: Sarah
conversation.text: I’m so excited about the dancing competition!

options.text: On the large table in the garden.
I usually have a party in May.
That would be very helpful, thank you.
Of course! I wouldn't miss it.
At about half past four, I think.
It’s a secret, so I can’t tell you!
I’m much better at singing than dancing.
No, I don't like chocolate cake.

explanations_vi: Sarah hỏi Paul đã mua quà (present) chưa, Paul đáp Đó là bí mật, nên tớ không thể nói cho cậu biết (It's a secret, so I can't tell you!).
Sarah hỏi mấy giờ Paul sẽ đến (What time do you think you'll arrive), Paul trả lời khoảng 4 giờ rưỡi (At about half past four).
Sarah hỏi có cần nhờ bố đến đón Paul không (pick you up), Paul trả lời Thế thì tốt quá, cảm ơn cậu (That would be very helpful, thank you).
Sarah hỏi nên để đồ ăn thức uống ở đâu (Where), Paul đề nghị Để trên chiếc bàn lớn trong vườn (On the large table in the garden).
Sarah rất hào hứng về cuộc thi nhảy (dancing competition), Paul nói Tớ hát giỏi hơn nhảy nhiều (I'm much better at singing than dancing).
